testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it - hear what our distinguished clients have to say.

testimonial1.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonial1.text: HR Office transformed our HR management process. What used to take hours now takes minutes. The analytics are incredible!

testimonial2.name: Michael Chen
testimonial2.text: The real-time tracking and automated approvals have saved us countless hours. Best HR tool we've ever used.

testimonial3.name: Emily Rodriguez
testimonial3.text: Finally, an HR management system that employees actually love to use. The face recognition login is a game-changer!

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked
faq.description: Everything you need to know about HR Office and how it works.
faq.q1: How does the leave management system work?
faq.a1: Our platform streamlines the entire leave request process. Employees can submit requests through an intuitive interface, managers receive instant notifications for approval, and all leave balances are automatically tracked and updated in real-time.
faq.q2: Can I integrate this with my existing HR tools?
faq.a2: Yes! We offer seamless integrations with popular HR platforms, payroll systems, and calendar applications. Our API allows for custom integrations to fit your specific workflow needs.
faq.q3: What kind of reports can I generate?
faq.a3: You can generate comprehensive reports on leave trends, attendance patterns, team availability, and employee balances. All reports are exportable in PDF, Excel, and CSV formats with customizable date ranges and filters.
faq.a4: Absolutely. We use bank-level encryption (SSL/TLS), regular security audits, and comply with GDPR and other data protection regulations. Your data is stored in secure, redundant data centers with automatic backups.
faq.a5: Getting started is easy! Sign up for a free trial, add your team members, configure your leave policies, and you're ready to go. Our onboarding team will guide you through the setup process and answer any questions.
faq.a6: We offer multiple support channels including email support, live chat, comprehensive documentation, and video tutorials. Professional and Enterprise plans include priority support and dedicated account managers.

legal.contactUsDesc: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at:
legal.cookiesDesc: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and preferences. No third-party tracking cookies are used.
legal.cookiesNote: Note: We only use essential cookies. No tracking or advertising cookies are used on this platform.
legal.dataRetentionDesc: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, all associated data will be removed within 30 days.
legal.dataSecurityDesc: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data:

legal.ensureConsent: Ensure proper consent for biometric data collection
legal.ensureSecurity: Ensure platform security and prevent abuse
legal.gdprDesc: For users in the European Economic Area, we comply with GDPR. You have the following rights:
legal.infoWeCollectDesc: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:

legal.limitationLiabilityDesc: ShieldOffice shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.
legal.maintainConfidentiality: Maintain the confidentiality of your account credentials
legal.notAttemptAccess: Not attempt to access accounts or data of other users
legal.respondWithin: We will respond to your request within 30 days.
legal.rightOfAccess: Right of Access - request a copy of your personal data
legal.rightToErasure: Right to Erasure - request deletion of your data
legal.rightToObject: Right to Object - object to processing of your data
legal.rightToPortability: Right to Portability - receive your data in a portable format
legal.rightToRectification: Right to Rectification - correct inaccurate personal data
legal.serviceAvailabilityDesc: We strive to maintain 99.9% uptime but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. Scheduled maintenance will be communicated in advance.
legal.terminationDesc: We may terminate or suspend your access immediately, without prior notice, for conduct that we believe violates these terms.
legal.useOfServicesDesc: You agree to use our platform in accordance with applicable laws and these terms. You must:
